title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kizaru, Vegapunk as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Navy HQ, NEW WORLD

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The world is shocked!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The world's gonna sink...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...into the ocean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Does he realize what he's saying?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dr. Vegaspunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "The town of mockery" - mock Town

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gyaaaah Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This guy's a riot! Is he trying to panic everyone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And take the world down with him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How the heck is the whole world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: meant to sink, Mr. Genius?! ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: “THE CITY OF WATER” - WATER SEVEN

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he was just talking about this city, I'd believe him in an instant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the whole world? It'd take a lot more than rising tides to do that, right???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: 'The Underwater Prison' - Impel Down

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FO FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU FU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This just gets better and better! Isn't it your job to take care of the inmates. Magellan?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you gonna do if the prison gets completely flooded?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have a point. The sudden sea level rise earlier caused havoc with some cells...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that was only one meter, how many meters would it take to cover the whole world?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Most urban areas would be screwed if water levels rose just another 5 meters!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu Fu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We could always go somewhere HIGH UP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ryugu kingdom, Fishman Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is that really going to happen???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Bwaah

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmmm... it sounds so outlandish- Jamon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: EGGHEAD - 'The island of the future'

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is crazy talk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the world's most acclaimed scientist is saying it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, it doesn't matter if it's true; it'll cause mass panic and chaos!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Enough with the lies and madness, vegapunk!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
